next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page; pass it as the cursor input. Absent on the last page.

id.description: Conversation ID (C… channel, D… DM, G…/mpdm group).

is_member.description: Whether the connected account belongs to this channel — the list also contains channels merely visible to you. Absent for DMs.

user.description: For DMs: authoritative raw Slack user ID of the counterpart. Use for follow-up calls or <@U…> mentions; do not show it as plain text to the user.

user_display_name.description: For DMs: human-readable counterpart name resolved via users.info. Use this in user-facing output. Absent when resolution failed.
